title: Lyyt | Compact Ultra Bright LED Worklight & Torch
features: Item dimensions of only 135 x 100 x 40mm make our unit very Compact and portable
Option of work light or torch function with the press of a button
180° adjustable stand makes it perfect for almost any situation & made from a tough & rigid plastic material
Requires 3 x AA batteries (not supplied) Alkaline batteries are recommended
description: From the manufacturer LYYT | Compact Ultra Bright LED Worklight & Torch A super durable, battery powered LED work light and torch. The practical, compact design makes it ideal for using around the home or workplace, with an adjustable handle to allow the light to be positioned at different angles. With the 180° adjustable stand and ultra bright COB LED, There is no dark spot that can not be made bright. PRODUCT FEATURES: Compact and portable Work light and torch function Press button once for work light and press twice for torch Ultra bright COB style LEDs 180° adjustable stand Made of HIPS - tough, rigid plastic material Requires 3 x AA batteries (not supplied) SPECIFICATION: Material HIPS - High Impact Polystyrene Brightness 100 lumen Dimensions 135 x 100 x 40mm Weight 138g LED : type COB
